query:
-- Criar lead de teste para Guilherme admin
INSERT INTO leads (nome, telefone, email, origem, status, corretorId, projetoInteresse, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('Lead Teste Admin', '11999999999', 'teste.admin@example.com', 'whatsapp', 'em_atendimento', 6, 'Projeto Teste', NOW(), NOW());

-- Criar follow-up para hoje
INSERT INTO follow_ups (leadId, corretorId, dataFollowUp, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 
  id,
  6,
  CONCAT(CURDATE(), ' 09:00:00'),
  'pendente',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
FROM leads
WHERE nome = 'Lead Teste Admin'
LIMIT 1;

-- Verificar
SELECT 
  f.id,
  f.leadId,
  f.corretorId,
  f.dataFollowUp,
  f.status,
  l.nome,
  DATE(f.dataFollowUp) as data_followup,
  CURDATE() as hoje,
  CASE WHEN DATE(f.dataFollowUp) = CURDATE() THEN 'SIM' ELSE 'NAO' END as eh_hoje
FROM follow_ups f
INNER JOIN leads l ON f.leadId = l.id
WHERE f.corretorId = 6
  AND f.status = 'pendente';
